item.title: Anthropic raises $65 Billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

item.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

item.title: In just 3 weeks, StrictlyVC is coming to Los Angeles
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: StrictlyVC Los Angeles is on June 18. Join for meaningful networking and fireside chats with leaders from Mach Industries, Shinkei Systems, and more. Register today.

item.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

item.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

item.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

item.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

item.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

item.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

item.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

item.title: 2 days left: Lock in ticket savings of up to $410 to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Savings of up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 tickets end tomorrow, May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save and join 10,000+ tech leaders on October 13-15 in San Francisco.

item.title: Visa invests in Replit to power agentic payments for developers
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Visa said that over 1,000 employees have been using Replit for prototyping and development.

item.title: Has the hunt for AI compute uncovered the next Cerebras?
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
item.description: General Compute is betting SambaNova will be the next breakout chipmaker.

item.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Built on top of the open source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.

item.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Google is embarrassing itself, again.

item.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

item.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

item.title: Your SEO strategy is optimized for a search engine that no longer exists.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan, Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Google I/O made it official: AI-generated answers are now front and center in search, and most brands have almost no visibility into how AI is describing them to their customers. For anyone who has spent years building a strategy around 10 blue links, the rules just changed in a pretty significant way.  On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecca […]

item.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.

item.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.
